top_findings.title: MCP server fully implemented with 14 registered tools
top_findings.evidence: src/server.ts:21-244 — buildServer() creates McpServer with tools: list_competitions, list_seasons, find_matches, head_to_head, team_record, list_teams, top_scoring_teams, standings, season_summary, find_players, brazilian_players_by_club, match_stats, biggest_wins, compare_seasons
top_findings.suggestion: No action needed — exceeds spec expectations
